title: MCA Capitals | A Monarchy Mod for MCA Reborn
description: A Minecraft Comes Alive Reborn addon that adds a Monarchy system to MCA. Complete with in-game events, titles, and succession!
body:
# MCA Capitals

**MCA Capitals** is an addon for **Minecraft Comes Alive Reborn** that adds a working monarchy and capital system to MCA villages.

Grow your villages into powerful Capitals, appoint Kings and Queens, form Royal Courts, recognize Heirs, grant Noble Titles, and shape the future of your MCA world.

![The Royal Family of Hazelhost, House Cloverly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/981f35b412fa6d58436aa676a6d5dc8811fd1786_0.webp)

---

## Main Features

- Villages can become **Capitals** after reaching a population of 15.
- Use a **Royal Charter** to appoint a villager Sovereign, or claim the throne yourself, if the villagers will have you.
- Adds Monarch titles including **King**, **Queen**, **High King**, and **High Queen**.
- Adds Royal Family titles including **Crown Prince**, **Crown Princess**, **Prince**, **Princess**, consorts, and dowagers.
- Adds noble ranks including **Dukes**, **Duchesses**, **Lords**, and **Ladies**.
- Adds court roles including **Hand of the Crown**, **Lord Commander**, **Grand Maester**, **Court Herald**, and **Royal Guards**.
- Adds succession, abdication, disinheritance, legitimization, and heir designation.
- Adds petitions for Noble Titles, Lord Commander, and the throne.
- Adds a throne seizure path for players who want to take power by force.
- Adds royal documents, seals, decrees, and the **Capital Chronicle**, which tells the story of your Capital.
- Adds mourning behaviour and mourning clothing after major deaths.
- Adds Capital-aware villager dialogue and **dynamic chat lines** per rank and about specific court news.
- Adds Royal Guard assignment and sovereign-following behaviour.
- Adds **Surnames for villagers** which become **House Names** after the founding villager of the house reaches Noble Status or above.
- Villagers from **established Houses get a House Motto** for the House they belong to.

---

Version 1.0.4 brings updates to the Villager UI in preperation for a most detialed look at each villagers history and current House. 

![Maester and his House Words - Updated UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ff735e204b726e4229e45fac207b2ac56fc4c24.png)

## Capital Progression

As a village grows, more court systems unlock.

Capitals can eventually appoint a Court Herald to make royal announcements, a Hand of the Crown, Lord Commander to assist you in defending the Capital, Grand Maester, Royal Guards, Nobles, and Heirs. Player petitions and royal court management become available as the capital develops.

## Along with progression comes **Capital Events!**

A court in mourning after the death of the King Consort.

![A Court in Mourning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc1b421f2eacf127572bebddaded7bccc6bbe529_0.webp)
---

## Requirements

- **Minecraft 1.20.1 and 1.21.1**
- **Minecraft Comes Alive Reborn**
- **Architectury API** (for version 1.20.1 only)

Currently avalible for Forge 1.20.1 and NeoForge 1.21.1. It will be updated to Fabric 1.20.1 and 1.21.1 when I have time to update, as moving to a new mod loader is a large undertaking.

After version 1.0.4 and the Fabric versions are created, all future updates and additions will be made on version 1.21.1 onwards.


## Important Notes

Back up your worlds before adding MCA Capitals to an existing MCA Reborn world.

This is the first public release, so some systems will continue to expand in future updates.

---

## Thanks to the Creators of MCA and MCA Reborn!

I have been working on this addon for a while now, and it is because of this mod that I can learn from open-source resources and begin developing mods for the games I love. Thanks for keeping the mod alive!

---

If you want to support this addon or if you want to stay up-to-date on the updates and features for this and my other mods, please considder checking out my Ko-Fi!
